text:
Created attachment 181153
svn diff for net-im/mbpurple

I use this, so I'm going to rescue it.
While here, take over MAINTAINER-ship.

Changes
change MASTER_SITES, WWW, and MAINTAINER

That's it!

See attached svn diff, net-im_mbpurple.diff for details.
For bonus points, I'm even throwing in a QA LOG. :-)

Thanks!

--Chris
